readiness_reasons: Diluted share count not available from supplied evidence; EPS and per-share metrics cannot be populated. Total equity value used for scenario valuation.
Segment revenue, margin and profit weights are analytical estimates derived from private channel evidence (KPE02, KPE06) because official segment disclosures are missing.
Capital expenditure beyond FY26 is estimated; only FY26 guidance of ~RMB 18 bn is supplied.
Working capital and cash conversion assumptions rely on a single quarter OCF/net profit ratio (Q1 2026).
Conflicts between market rumours (KPE10, KPE11) and company guidance are unresolved; scenario probabilities reflect underwriting judgement.
Material segment three-year driver lines are missing: AI PCB, Non-AI PCB
Valuation has not closed from mutually exclusive buckets to per-share fair value.
volume_price_cost driver chain is incomplete; missing: utilization
Three-year values remain missing for consolidated line(s): eps

company_model.business_archetype: 产能出货型PCB制造商，产品以高多层/HDI印制线路板为主，面向AI算力、数据通信、汽车电子等领域
company_model.value_proposition_and_customers: 为GPU/ASIC加速卡、服务器、交换机和光模块提供高密度互联（HDI）与高速PCB；核心客户包括国际GPU龙头、CSP和工业客户。价值源于高复杂度、高可靠性、快速量产及与客户平台共同迭代的能力。
company_model.revenue_equation: 收入 = Σ (各工厂产能 × 利用率) × 产品结构ASP × (1-退换率); 总ASP受产品组合（高端AI vs 普通）和成本传导机制影响
company_model.profit_equation: 营业利润 = 收入 - 原材料成本(覆铜板、铜箔等) - 人工及制造费用 - 研发/销售/管理费用; 核心毛利率由产品结构、良率和原材料成本决定，运营杠杆来自规模效应和产能爬坡
company_model.cash_flow_equation: OCF = 净利润 + 折旧摊销 ± 营运资本变动; FCF = OCF - 资本支出; 典型成长期资本支出巨大，FCF可能为负，但产能释放后现金回收加快
company_model.capital_intensity_and_reinvestment: 重资产制造，单位收入需持续投入产能建设与设备；FY26资本支出指引约人民币180亿元，主要用于惠州工厂10/11及后续项目；折旧压力随产能转固逐步上升
moat_mechanisms: 客户黏性与平台认证：深度绑定国际GPU龙头，需通过长周期认证且配套ASIC路线图
技术壁垒：mSAP、高叠层HDI、大尺寸高多层板工艺，新进入者追赶周期长
规模优势与全球布局：惠州、越南、泰国多地产能，能满足头部客户大批量与地缘分散需求
moat_to_financial_transmission: 客户黏性 → 份额稳定/ASP相对坚挺 → 收入确定性
技术壁垒 → 高端产品占比提升 → 混合ASP与毛利率韧性
规模与全球布局 → 快速接单能力与关税优化 → 运营利润和收入增长
structural_risks: 大客户集中风险（尤以GPU龙头为主）
产能爬坡与折旧高峰期对利润的压制
PCB行业原材料价格波动（覆铜板、铜箔）及地缘政治导致的供应中断
AI硬件路线变动（如正交背板推迟、材料方案变更）可能使公司在研产品失去适销性
贸易摩擦和境外收入（占比约65-81%）面临的关税与合规风险
key_unknowns: AI PCB的具体收入、毛利率和产能利用率
Rubin Ultra平台最终架构及其对公司正交背板/高端材料需求的影响
ASIC/GPU客户占比及后续向TPU等CSP客户的真实渗透速度
FY27-28资本支出与新一轮产能转固后的折旧规模
股份稀释（定向增发及员工持股计划）时长与幅度

business_unit_map.economic_role: 面向GPU/ASIC加速卡、服务器主板和数通设备的高端PCB，驱动当前及未来增长
business_unit_map.revenue_driver_equation: AI基础设施资本开支 → GPU/ASIC平台迭代 → 公司产能(工厂10-13) × 利用率 × 产品结构(HDI/mSAP) × ASP(成本加成)
business_unit_map.profit_driver_equation: 收入 - 原材料(覆铜板/铜箔) - 制造费用 - 研发摊销; 毛利率取决于良率、产品层数和成本传导效率
business_unit_map.cash_and_capital_equation: 营收增长强劲但前期建厂和产能爬坡需大量现金消耗；稳定后营运资本周转改善，OCF转换为正值
missing_inputs: AI PCB exact revenue and gross margin
AI PCB capacity utilization and volume
business_unit_map.next_verification: 公司中报或全年报告披露分产品线营收/利润，或管理层电话会议给出更详细分拆

business_unit_map.economic_role: 汽车电子、工业控制、消费电子等领域的传统多层板，选择性接单以优化ASP和毛利
business_unit_map.revenue_driver_equation: 终端需求（汽车/工业/通信）→ 公司选择性接单 × 存量产能 × ASP
business_unit_map.profit_driver_equation: 收入 - 原材料 - 制造费用 - 少量研发; 毛利率依赖成本控制和订单结构
business_unit_map.cash_and_capital_equation: 现金产出稳定，但无大规模扩张性投入；营运资本波动取决于下游客户账期
missing_inputs: Non-AI PCB revenue split and growth rate
business_unit_map.next_verification: 管理报告讨论非AI业务订单趋势或下游领域景气度

business_unit_map.economic_role: 境外销售占总营收约65-81%，以美元/其他外币结算，直接影响收入汇率风险和地缘敞口
business_unit_map.revenue_driver_equation: 境外营收 = 全球客户订单 × ASP × 汇率
business_unit_map.profit_driver_equation: 毛利率受汇率波动和潜在的关税转嫁影响
business_unit_map.cash_and_capital_equation: 回款以外币为主，汇率变动影响应收和现金转换
missing_inputs: Exact export share in FY25 and FY26 guidance
business_unit_map.next_verification: 年报中披露外销收入占比及汇兑损益

segment_models.products_or_services: 高多层、HDI、mSAP高速PCB，用于AI加速器(GPU/ASIC)、服务器、数据网络
segment_models.customers_and_channel: 全球GPU/ASIC龙头、CSP、数据中心设备商；以直接销售和ODM模组形式交付
demand_and_order_drivers: 全球AI数据中心资本开支
segment_models.industry_supply_and_capacity: 高端PCB供应壁垒高，可规模量产HDI/mSAP的厂商有限；公司通过工厂10-13大幅扩张产能，同时越南/泰国布局
segment_models.volume_share_utilization: 目标在核心客户全品类中保持约50%份额；公司对GPU计算载板HDI多数份额有信心
segment_models.price_asp_take_rate: ASP以成本加成模式为主，公司表示原材料成本稳定且成本传导顺畅，降价压力存在但可控 (KPE02 vs KPE10)
segment_models.unit_cost_and_input_prices: 覆铜板、铜箔等主要原材料；公司称成本稳定，新一代产品传导顺畅
segment_models.margin_and_operating_leverage: Q1 2026整体毛利率34.5%，随着产品组合向高端倾斜，毛利率有望持平或微升；运营杠杆在产能爬升后于FY27-28逐渐显现
segment_models.working_capital_and_cash_conversion: Q1 2026 OCF/净利润1.64倍，现金转换较强；存货/收入比17.7%，随产能增加阶段性攀升
segment_models.causal_analysis: AI算力需求持续扩张推动订单，公司通过工厂10-13大幅增加HDI/mSAP产能，产品结构升级，ASP平稳，毛利率有望维持34-35%，产能利用率爬升后利润增速将快于收入
segment_models.valuation_treatment: 核心增长引擎，给予较高估值乘数
strongest_counterevidence: Rubin Ultra正交背板推迟，导致大规模PCB价值下修风险（KPE11）
missing_inputs: 产能利用率及爬坡节奏
segment_models.next_verification: 公司2026中报/全年报分部披露，或关键客户平台计划更新

segment_models.products_or_services: 传统多层PCB，涵盖汽车电子、工业控制、消费电子、通信等领域
segment_models.customers_and_channel: 多元化客户群，通过直销和分销商；公司选择性承接高ASP/GPM订单
demand_and_order_drivers: 工业自动化与5G基础设施
segment_models.industry_supply_and_capacity: 行业供给充足，价格竞争激烈；公司通过选择性接单和成本控制维持盈利
segment_models.volume_share_utilization: 随AI业务扩张，非AI产能可能部分被重新部署或维持选择性策略，收入占比逐渐下降
segment_models.price_asp_take_rate: ASP和毛利成为选择订单的首要标准，管理层明确优先高利润订单
segment_models.unit_cost_and_input_prices: 原材料成本与AI板块共享，公司声称稳定且无额外压力
segment_models.margin_and_operating_leverage: 毛利率低于AI板块，但通过订单筛选可维持在健康水平；经营杠杆不显著
segment_models.working_capital_and_cash_conversion: 回款周期可能长于AI，但总体稳定
segment_models.causal_analysis: 需求温和增长，公司主动筛选高利润订单，使该板块贡献稳定但增长缓慢的收入和利润，预计毛利率维持在25-30%
segment_models.valuation_treatment: 稳定现金流业务，估值相对保守
strongest_counterevidence: 全球宏观经济疲软可能导致汽车/工业需求下滑
原材料成本如果大幅上涨而未能及时转嫁
segment_models.next_verification: 管理层指引或季度订单趋势

underwriting_questions.question: AI PCB部门的ASIC/GPU收入组合及V8 TPU渗透速度如何？
underwriting_questions.why_it_matters: ASIC/GPU平衡直接影响收入增长基础和大客户集中度；快速切入V8 TPU可显著提升2027-2028年收入且提升估值确定性。
underwriting_questions.current_answer: 公司目标ASIC/GPU收入各占50%，并预计2026年底前进入V8 TPU供应；当前证据来自管理层路演，未披露含具体数字的合同。
bull_evidence: KPE02: 公司为美国主要CSP V7 CPU供PCB，有信心FY26末进入V8 TPU供应链
KPE06: ASIC设计从HLC转向HDI，胜宏有望受益
bear_evidence: KPE11: TPU路线也可能面临类似GPU的架构延迟风险
ASIC市场可能被其他PCB供应商瓜分
underwriting_questions.next_verification: CSP的TPU路线图更新或胜宏的供应商资质确认公告

underwriting_questions.question: Rubin Ultra平台正交背板是否真的延迟，延迟对胜宏的远期收入冲击有多大？
underwriting_questions.why_it_matters: 正交背板曾被视为2027年以后的重要收入催化剂；若取消，远期AI收入预测可能需要下调10-16%（根据Jefferies估计），显著影响估值。
underwriting_questions.current_answer: Jefferies称正交背板推迟至2028年，2027年Kyber出货概率极低；胜宏认为进度未延迟，正在评估多种材料方案。冲突未解决。
bull_evidence: KPE02: 胜宏认为正交背板在Rubin Ultra中被采用的进度没有延迟
KPE06: 公司正在评估10多种材料/供应商组合
bear_evidence: KPE11: Jefferies详细研究报告提出推迟，2027/2028年PCB市场规模面临下修
missing_evidence: NVIDIA Rubin Ultra官方硬件路线图
胜宏在正交背板上的预估订单值
underwriting_questions.next_verification: NVIDIA GTC或官网架构发布，Q2 FY27供应链核实

underwriting_questions.question: FY26资本支出180亿元能否在FY27-FY28实现产能转化为收入，回报（ROIC）何时能达到可接受水平？
underwriting_questions.why_it_matters: 大规模资本支出是公司中长期成长的核心，但也带来折旧飙升和自由现金流承压；若产能爬坡慢于预期，ROIC将长期低迷，拖低估值。
underwriting_questions.current_answer: 管理层指引工厂10/11主要2026年建设，工厂12/13后续；产能爬坡通常需要数季度，大规模贡献可能从FY27开始。
bull_evidence: EV039: 在建工程余额增至51.7亿元，同比增长43%
KPE02: 公司表示产能扩张按计划进行，惠州厂房十/十一有序推进
bear_evidence: PCB重资产行业，产能爬坡和良率提升历来慢于预期
如果AI需求低于预期，新增产能可能变成闲置成本
missing_evidence: 工厂级产能、投资回收期测算
underwriting_questions.next_verification: 2026中报或全年折旧新增额，管理层对爬坡节奏的更新

underwriting_questions.question: 英伟达是否真正实施PCB降价10%，公司能否通过成本传导和产品组合维持毛利率？
underwriting_questions.why_it_matters: 直接决定AI PCB ASP和毛利率趋势；如果降价成真且无法完全传导，毛利率将下滑，EPS遭受双重挤压。
underwriting_questions.current_answer: 市场传闻叠加公司否认；管理层表示原材料成本稳定且新一代产品成本传导顺畅，FY26毛利率与FY25大致持平。
bull_evidence: KPE02: 成本传导顺畅，FY26毛利率预计与FY25持平
bear_evidence: KPE10: 市场传闻英伟达要求PCB降价10%
PCB竞争加剧背景，历史上存在年降压力
missing_evidence: 与英伟达的实际合同条款
underwriting_questions.next_verification: Q2 2026季度报告毛利率以及与客户的季度议价结果

underwriting_questions.question: 在股份稀释风险（员工持股计划、股权激励）下，EPS增长能否跟上净利润增长？
underwriting_questions.why_it_matters: 员工持股计划上限7亿元且采用二级市场购买，可能增加总股本；未来定向增发也可能稀释；EPS是高估值股票的核心指标。
underwriting_questions.current_answer: 已公布员工持股计划框架，具体股本影响未知；过往存在定向增发计划（2025年注册稿）。
bear_evidence: KPE01: 员工持股计划总额不超过7亿元，通过二级市场购买
EV007: 2025年向特定对象发行股票募集说明书（注册稿）
missing_evidence: 员工持股计划的具体执行时间、价格及股份数量
underwriting_questions.next_verification: 公司公告员工持股计划实施结果或定向增发发行结果

forecast_lines.formula: FY26=FY25×(1+43%) driven by AI ramp; FY27+30%, FY28+25%; incorporates KPE02 revenue share targets and capacity expansion
Revenue × (1 - gross margin); FY25 GM ~33.4% (implied from Q1 YoY), FY26E 34.5%, FY27E 34.5%, FY28E 34.0%
Gross profit / revenue; FY25 estimated from Q1 2025 implied 33.38%; FY26 guided flat, FY27 stable, FY28 slight compression from depreciation
Revenue × operating margin; FY25 ~25.5% (implied Q1 2025), FY26 27.5%, FY27 27.0%, FY28 26.5%
Operating profit / revenue; FY25 estimated from Q1 2025 (25.31% + 1.91pp gives 27.22% Q1 2026); FY26 slightly above Q1 on scale, then gradual normalisation
Revenue × net margin; FY25 ~21.5% (implied), FY26 22.5%, FY27 21.5%, FY28 20.5%
forecast_lines.key_sensitivity: Finance cost, tax rate, non-recurring items

forecast_lines.formula: Parent net profit / revenue; FY25 estimated from Q1 2025 21.35%; FY26 improved by mix, then gradually mean-reverting
forecast_lines.key_sensitivity: Interest expense and effective tax rate

forecast_lines.formula: Parent net profit / diluted shares; diluted shares unavailable
Parent net profit × OCF/NI ratio; FY25 ~1.20x, FY26-28 gradually moderating to 1.15x
FY26 = management guidance ~RMB 18 bn (KPE02); FY27-28 assumed step-down as major factories complete
missing_inputs: FY27 and FY28 exact capex plans

forecast_lines.formula: OCF - Capex; heavy investment period turns FCF-negative until FY28

operating_assumptions: FY26 revenue CNY 30,000 mn (+55%), FY27 42,000 mn, FY28 55,000 mn
Operating margin rises to 29% by FY28 on strong operating leverage
Parent net profit: FY26 7,500 mn, FY27 10,500 mn, FY28 14,300 mn
Capex FY26 18,000 mn, then 10,000 mn, 6,000 mn
Rubin Ultra architecture proceeds as scheduled; no price cut materialises
scenarios.falsification: Nvidia 10% price cut confirmed; Rubin Ultra officially delayed; FY26 revenue tracks below CNY 26,000 mn

operating_assumptions: FY26 revenue CNY 27,600 mn, FY27 35,900 mn, FY28 44,900 mn
Parent net profit: FY26 6,210 mn, FY27 7,719 mn, FY28 9,205 mn
Capex FY26 18,000 mn, then 12,000 mn, 8,000 mn
AI revenue share reaches 65%/70%/75%; ASP stable with cost pass-through
scenarios.falsification: FY26 revenue below CNY 25,000 mn; gross margin below 33%

operating_assumptions: FY26 revenue CNY 24,000 mn (+24%), FY27 28,800 mn, FY28 33,000 mn
Gross margin declines to 32.0% in FY26 due to price cut and mix
Parent net profit: FY26 4,800 mn, FY27 5,400 mn, FY28 6,000 mn
Capex maintained at high level; FCF deeply negative
Nvidia price cut and delayed Rubin Ultra materially reduce volume
scenarios.falsification: Q2 2026 gross margin recovers above 33%; Nvidia roadmap confirms original timeline

thesis_financial_bridges.thesis_or_question: AI PCB收入占比提升驱动营收高增长并推升混合毛利率
thesis_financial_bridges.driver_formula: Consolidated revenue = AI revenue + Non-AI revenue; AI revenue = % mix × total revenue
thesis_financial_bridges.base_assumption: AI revenue share rises from ~45% in FY25 to 65%/70%/75% in FY26/27/28
thesis_financial_bridges.bull_assumption: AI share 70%/80%/85%; AI PCB ASP higher
thesis_financial_bridges.bear_assumption: AI share stuck at 55% due to delays/share loss; price cuts
thesis_financial_bridges.revenue_impact: base: FY26 revenue CNY 27,600 mn; bull: 30,000 mn; bear: 24,000 mn
thesis_financial_bridges.profit_impact: base: parent NP 6,210 mn; bull: 7,500 mn; bear: 4,800 mn
thesis_financial_bridges.fcf_or_capital_impact: Higher revenue improves OCF but capex heavy
thesis_financial_bridges.valuation_impact: Higher growth and margin support higher P/E multiple

thesis_financial_bridges.thesis_or_question: 毛利率持平或上升，得益于产品结构升级和成本传导
thesis_financial_bridges.driver_formula: Gross margin = (AI GM% × AI weight) + (Non-AI GM% × Non-AI weight)
thesis_financial_bridges.base_assumption: AI GM ~36%, Non-AI GM ~28%, blended GM 34.5% in FY26
thesis_financial_bridges.revenue_impact: Same revenue base, gross profit varies
thesis_financial_bridges.profit_impact: 1 pp GM change = ~CNY 276 mn on FY26 base revenue -> NP impact ~207 mn (assuming 25% tax)

thesis_financial_bridges.thesis_or_question: 大规模CAPEX带来产能翻倍，驱动2027-2028年收入跃升，但也带来折旧和FCF压力
thesis_financial_bridges.driver_formula: New revenue = new capacity × utilization × ASP; incremental depreciation = capex / useful life
thesis_financial_bridges.base_assumption: FY26 capex 18,000 mn, factories 10/11 complete by FY27; FY27-28 revenue add ~20-30% p.a.
thesis_financial_bridges.bull_assumption: Faster ramp, revenue grows 40% p.a.; depreciation spread over 15 yrs
thesis_financial_bridges.bear_assumption: Ramp delayed, revenue grows 15% p.a.; depreciation hits sooner
thesis_financial_bridges.revenue_impact: base: FY28 revenue 44,900 mn; bull: 55,000 mn; bear: 33,000 mn
thesis_financial_bridges.profit_impact: Bull higher profit; bear margin contraction from fixed costs
thesis_financial_bridges.fcf_or_capital_impact: FCF deeply negative in FY26-27, turn positive in FY28 base case
thesis_financial_bridges.valuation_impact: Market may reward capacity build if demand visible; higher risk if uncertain
missing_inputs: Detailed capex schedule per factory, useful lives

thesis_financial_bridges.thesis_or_question: 客户多元化（ASIC/TPU）降低对单一GPU客户的依赖，提升收入稳定性
thesis_financial_bridges.driver_formula: Revenue stability = f(GPU customer share, ASIC/CSP share)
thesis_financial_bridges.base_assumption: GPU:ASIC revenue ratio moves to 50:50 over time
thesis_financial_bridges.bull_assumption: ASIC accelerates, gains 60% by FY28; wins major CSP TPU
thesis_financial_bridges.revenue_impact: Indirect: reduces downside risk; bull case supports higher revenue multiple
thesis_financial_bridges.profit_impact: ASIC may have different margin profile, but overall diversification premium
thesis_financial_bridges.valuation_impact: Lower concentration risk can justify higher P/E

moat_evidence_tests.moat_mechanism: 客户黏性与长周期认证壁垒
moat_evidence_tests.observable_test: 对比公司与PCB同行的前五大客户集中度及客户更换率；胜宏科技是否在Nvidia的GB300计算载板HDI中保持多数份额
moat_evidence_tests.comparison_basis: 行业：鹏鼎控股、沪电股份、深南电路等同类PCB供应商
moat_evidence_tests.evidence_result: 公司声称目标保持核心客户全品类50%份额，暂无公开份额数据；Nvidia供应链无公开份额报告
moat_evidence_tests.financial_transmission: 稳定ASP与高产能利用率 → 毛利率韧性 → 可预测的EPS
moat_evidence_tests.strongest_counterevidence: Nvidia引入更多PCB供应商以分散风险，可能降低胜宏份额
moat_evidence_tests.next_verification: 从第三方拆解或客户报告中获取份额数据

moat_evidence_tests.observable_test: 比较公司量产的最高层数、线宽/线距与行业领先水平；研发费用率与资本支出是否持续领先同行
moat_evidence_tests.comparison_basis: 鹏鼎控股、沪电股份、深南电路的资本支出/收入比及研发占比
moat_evidence_tests.evidence_result: 胜宏2025年研发投入7.78亿，同比增长72.88%，积极投入14阶36层HDI研发；资本支出规模A股PCB企业中最大
moat_evidence_tests.financial_transmission: 高端技术 → 高附加值订单 → 高端产品占比提升 → 综合毛利率高于行业均值
moat_evidence_tests.strongest_counterevidence: 如果技术路线变化导致现有mSAP优势被替代，则壁垒可能失效
moat_evidence_tests.next_verification: 跟踪下一代技术（如正交背板/PTFE）的认证进度

valuation_buckets.valuation_method: Scenario-weighted P/E on FY27E parent net profit

valuation_closure.formula: Probability-weighted total equity value = 0.30×bull_value + 0.50×base_value + 0.20×bear_value; bull value = 10,500×40=420,000 mn; base = 7,719×35=270,165 mn; bear = 5,400×25=135,000 mn; weighted equity = 0.3×420k + 0.5×270.2k + 0.2×135k = 126,000 + 135,083 + 27,000 = 288,083 mn CNY. Current market cap 280,015 mn implies ~2.9% expected return before per-share conversion.
double_counting_checks: core_operating_business already captures consolidated parent profit; no additional SOTP added for AI PCB because it is inside consolidation
missing_inputs: current share price and diluted share count

frozen_reported_facts: FY2025 revenue CNY 19,292.31 mn, parent net profit CNY 4,312.0 mn (EV012)
Q1 2026 revenue CNY 5,519.49 mn, parent net profit CNY 1,288.43 mn (EV011)
Q1 2026 gross margin 34.46%, operating margin 27.22%, net margin 23.34% (EV014-EV016)
Market cap CNY 280,015 mn, PE TTM 59.84x as of 2026-07-07 (EV044, EV045)
FY26 capex guidance ~CNY 180 bn (KPE02), later corrected to 180亿 = CNY 18,000 mn
analyst_estimates: FY26 revenue CNY 27,600 mn, parent NP CNY 6,210 mn
FY27 revenue CNY 35,900 mn, parent NP CNY 7,719 mn
FY28 revenue CNY 44,900 mn, parent NP CNY 9,205 mn
Valuation multiples: bull 40x, base 35x, bear 25x on FY27E
unresolved_model_cells: Diluted share count and all per-share metrics
downstream_must_preserve: Three-year consolidated forecast lines (revenue, gross profit/margin, operating profit, parent NP, OCF, capex, FCF)
Two material business units (AI PCB, Non-AI PCB) with causal chains
Four thesis financial bridges (AI mix, gross margin, CAPEX, diversification)
Two moat evidence tests (customer stickiness, technology)
All unfrozen cells marked as analyst estimates

evidence_change_rules.financial_transmission: If confirmed, supports base case; if reversed, shift to bear

reconciliation_checks: FY2025 revenue and net profit consistent with EV012
FY26 capex guidance interpreted as 180亿 = CNY 18,000 mn (original payload had 180,000,000,000 likely a magnitude error)
OCF estimates based on Q1 2026 OCF/NI ratio of 1.64, conservatively moderated
analyst_instructions: Resolve dilute share count and current share price as highest priority; without them, per-share metrics remain blocked.
Track quarterly gross margins and Nvidia-related order news for evidence change rules.
Updatecapex beyond FY26 as formal guidance emerges.
If segment-level data becomes available, refine AI/Non-AI revenue splits and margin assumptions.
Re-evaluate scenario probabilities as Rubin Ultra architecture and TPU qualification firmed.
Validate the 180亿 capex figure against cash flow statements when 2026 annual report released.
preprocessing_notes: AI PCB and Non-AI PCB segments are analytical, inferred from KPE02/KPE06; no official filing segments.
Diluted shares unavailable; all per-share metrics withheld and valuation closure restricted to total equity value.
KPE evidence from private channels treated as unverified; conflicts with rumours flagged but not resolved.
Capex figure corrected to CNY 18,000 mn from evident payload error.
Commodity price mapping for PCB inputs is missing; raw material cost trends not quantified.
operating model driver coverage (volume_price_cost): capacity, volume, price/ASP, unit/input cost, spread/margin, capex/ROIC
